NAVAREA XIX 143/22
 1.SCIENTIFIC OCEANOGRAPHIC INSTRUMENTS ARE DEPLOYED IN THE WATER COLOUMN 
 IN THE AREA GIVEN BY THE WAYPOINTS BELOW: 

 A.76-27N 015-32E
 B.76-17N 016-04E
 C.76-07N 015-47E
 D.76-16N 014-45E

 2.THE TOP BUOYS ARE MORE THAN 10 M BELOW THE SURFACE. 
 NO SURFACE MARKER BUOYS ARE DEPLOYED ON LOCATION. 
 TRAWLING VESSELS ARE REQUESTED NOT TO TRAWL IN THE AREA FROM 17 OCT 2022 TO 31 OCTOBER 2023. 

 3.CONTACT INFORMATION: 
 FIRMAPOST@FFI.NO

 PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 107/22
